title: Callaloo alla Italiana
description: A hearty Italian stew made with sautéed callaloo and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the chopped callaloo and sauté for 2-3 minutes until wilted.
Add the smoky australian stew, zesty red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 15-20 minutes until the stew has thickened.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the callaloo alla italiana hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
